name: Gf Red Beans & Rice with Cilantro
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked rice, white or brown
recipeInstructions:
1. In a salad bowl, combine beans, rice, onion, celery, and red sweet pepper.
2. In a jar with a tight-fitting lid, shake together oil and remaining ingredients.
3. Pour the mixture over the bean mixture and toss lightly to thoroughly coat.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 3 hours or up to 3 days, stirring occasionally.
1/8 recipe = 194 calories, 1 1/2 starch + 1 1/2 fats + 1 Extra choice (7 grams total fat, 5 grams protein, 27 grams carbohydrate, 111 mg sodium, 279 mg potassium).
Good Vitamin C, High Fibre.
Adapted from Full of Beans by V. Currie & Kay Spicer, 1993 $18.95 Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, March 1994 ISBN 0-9695688-1-9 Published in co-operation with Canadian Celiac Assoc. and Sponsored by the Ontario Coloured Bean Growers Assoc.
